title: Xtra Dense Tuscan Dried Shrimp Frittata
description: A dense and energizing lacto-vegetarian Italian dish featuring dried shrimp, perfect for a filling breakfast or snack. This frittata combines the savory flavor of dried shrimp with a touch of sweetness from candy.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Chop the dried shrimp into small pieces and set aside.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, parmesan cheese, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chopped parsley, candy, and dried shrimp to the bowl and stir to combine.
Heat the olive oil in a 10-inch oven-safe skillet over medium heat.
Pour the egg mixture into the skillet and cook for 2 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let the frittata cool for 5 minutes.
Slice the frittata into wedges and serve hot.
